title: More Armor!
description: Adds more armor sets to Minecraft using different materials.
body:
**Not enough armor options? Try this mod! This mod adds more armor sets to Minecraft.** An armor set is compiled of a Helmet, Chestplate, Leggings, and Boots. **This mod adds the following armor sets:**

> Lapis armor
> 
> Copper armor
> 
> Emerald armor
> 
> Obsidian armor
> 
> Crying Obsidian armor
> 
> Amethyst armor
> 
> Quartz armor
> 
> Redstone armor

**Each of these armor sets stats have been adjusted by how hard they are to get, as well as each of their material's properties.** For example, Lapis armor is likely to get better enchantments in an enchantment table, because Lapis is used to enchant things. Obsidian armor is stronger than Iron but weaker than Diamond, because you use a Diamond pickaxe to mine Obsidian. **To get a matching set of tools for each armor piece, go download my [More Tools!](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-tools-ifamished) mod.
